nasb.text: Then the third angel poured out his bowl into the rivers and the springs of waters; and they became blood.

esv.text: The third angel poured out his bowl into the rivers and the springs of water, and they became blood.

cnv.text: 第三位天使把碗倒在江河和眾水的泉源裡，水就變成了血。

ccb.text: 第三位天使将碗倒在了江河与水泉里，水就变成了血。

csbs.text: 第三位天使把他的碗倒在江河和众水的泉源上，水就变成血。
